response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_number : varchar
ATTR airline_id : varchar : FK
ATTR origin_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : FK
ATTR baggage_belt_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_code : varchar
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK airplane_id
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : PK
ATTR registration : varchar
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK flight_id
PK status_timestamp
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_timestamp : timestamp : PK

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1 : FK=city_id
REL Flight -> BaggageBelt : 0..1 -> 1 : FK=baggage_belt_id
